revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from diacritic |name=From the ''same page name'' with diacritics |from=a page name that '''''has diacritical marks''''' (accents, umlauts, etc.) |to=essentially the same page name without those marks or a "List of..." page anchored to a promising list item name without diacritics |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** Sort these redirects with <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:DEFAULTSORT|DEFAULTSORT:(title without diacritics)]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki> and be sure to use a colon ( ''':''' ) rather than a pipe ( '''|''' ) to access the [[WP:MfB|magic word]] directly. ** This rcat can also be used on redirects to sections and anchors to indicate the diacritics version of a term/name written both ways. |all category=Redirects from titles with diacritics |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from diacritic |name=From the ''same page name'' with diacritics |from=a page name that '''''has diacritical marks''''' (accents, umlauts, etc.) |to=essentially the same page name without those marks or a "List of..." page anchored to a promising list item name without diacritics |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** Sort these redirects with <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:DEFAULTSORT|DEFAULTSORT:(title without diacritics)]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki> and be sure to use a colon ( ''':''' ) rather than a pipe ( '''|''' ) to access the [[WP:MfB|magic word]] directly. ** This rcat can also be used on redirects to sections and anchors to indicate the diacritics version of a term/name written both ways. |all category=Redirects from titles with diacritics |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** Sort these redirects with <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:DEFAULTSORT|DEFAULTSORT:(title without diacritics)]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki> and be sure to use a colon ( ''':''' ) rather than a pipe ( '''|''' ) to access the [[WP:MfB|magic word]] directly. ** This rcat can also be used on redirects to sections and anchors to indicate the diacritics version of a term/name written both ways. |all category=Redirects from titles with diacritics |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from diacritic |name=From the ''same page name'' with diacritics |from=a page name that '''''has diacritical marks''''' (accents, umlauts, etc.) |to=essentially the same page name without those marks or a "List of..." page anchored to a promising list item name without diacritics |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from diacritic |name=From the ''same page name'' with diacritics |from=a page name that '''''has diacritical marks''''' (accents, umlauts, etc.) |to=essentially the same page name without those marks or a "List of..." page anchored to a promising list item name without diacritics |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** Sort these redirects with <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:DEFAULTSORT|DEFAULTSORT:(title without diacritics)]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki> and be sure to use a colon ( ''':''' ) rather than a pipe ( '''|''' ) to access the [[WP:MfB|magic word]] directly. ** This rcat can also be used on redirects to sections and anchors to indicate the diacritics version of a term/name written both ways. |all category=Redirects from titles with diacritics |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
